title: C919 E-TRAS — max reverse traversal (S0→S6, then transient → S7)
description: Touchdown WOW + throttle pulled past -25° to traverse S6_MAX_REVERSE. Verifies the S5→S6 transition threshold (TRA ≤ -25°). Note: S6 is a 1-tick transient under the §6 state machine — both microswitches go FALSE outside [-9.8°, -1.4°], so once TRA crosses -25° the next-tick condition (not atltla AND not apwtla) fires S6→S7 immediately. The fixture's contract is 'S6 must appear in the trace', not 'S6 is the terminal state'.

events.note: +5°→-27° sweep clears SW1/SW2 windows and crosses S5→S6 threshold (-25°)
deploy command live in deep reverse
